_publications._publicationTitle: Epigenomic, genomic, and transcriptomic landscape of schwannomatosis.

_contextSnippet: Using RT-PCR we detected this fusion in SWNTS-SWNs (14%), consistently with a male predominance (14/22, 63%). Interestingly, majority of fusion-positive samples harbored germline mutations in LZTR1 (15/22, 68%, Chi-square, p = 0.025)
details: Successfully detected SH3PXD2A-HTRA1 gene fusion in 14% of SWNTS-SWNs with male predominance (63%), and identified that majority of fusion-positive samples harbored germline LZTR1 mutations (68%)
